name: Bon | Fishing Trip Date
description:
W4A

It’s the middle of winter and you don’t have all that much to do, besides work and all of that important stuff. So, you and your girlfriend decided on this amazing idea to go on a fishing trip on a boat, just the two of you (Luckily you know how to use a boat…)

Blergh... yea ion know what to say assass wanted this one i guess... kinda bro forced me to make it 😔🙏

The Artist for the Bot's pic is Syakunetuu
